profile.name: Andrei Conoval
profile.title: .NET Developer
profile.summary: I build and maintain web applications across modern .NET and JavaScript stacks, combining C# and ASP.NET Core on the backend with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and SQL-driven systems on the frontend and data layer.

stats.label: Software roles across Romania and Moldova

about.heading: Building reliable software across .NET backends, modern web frontends, and data-heavy systems.
about.intro: I am a software engineer with strong full-stack experience across C#, ASP.NET Core, React, Next.js, TypeScript, and SQL. I enjoy building systems that stay practical in production and maintainable as products evolve.
principles: Keep architecture clear, reliable, and easy to operate.
Design data models and queries with performance in mind.
Favor reusable UI and component libraries over one-off implementations.
Keep learning and apply new tools to real products quickly.
paragraphs: My core stack spans C# and .NET with ASP.NET Core, Web API, MVC, and Razor, together with modern frontend work in React, Next.js, TypeScript, HTML, and CSS. I am also comfortable designing relational data layers and writing performance-minded SQL for PostgreSQL, Microsoft SQL Server, and MySQL.

Beyond feature delivery, I have built a production-style notification platform end to end using a Next.js frontend, .NET services, RabbitMQ messaging, and PostgreSQL. I have also worked with Blazor and created reusable Blazor libraries and components with clean APIs and maintainable UI building blocks.

I have experience with AWS, Azure, CI/CD workflows, and Git-based collaboration, and I value clean architecture, reliability, and continuous improvement. I hold a Master's degree in modern technologies in software engineering.

skills.summary: Building APIs, business logic, and maintainable server applications in the .NET ecosystem.
Creating modern web interfaces and reusable component-driven experiences.
Designing relational models and writing practical SQL across multiple database platforms.
Deploying and operating production systems with cloud tooling, CI/CD, and messaging infrastructure.

experience.summary: Designing and developing need-based software programs in .NET while improving existing applications and database systems for specialized end-user roles.
achievements: Designs and develops software programs using .NET languages, primarily C#.
Analyzes and resolves application errors while maintaining and upgrading existing software.
Designs and implements high-availability databases aligned with end-user information needs and specialized roles.

experience.summary: Developed enterprise applications with React and .NET Core, deployed frontend and backend services on AWS, and contributed to team leadership and migration work.
achievements: Built applications using React and .NET Core across frontend and backend layers.
Handled frontend and backend deployments using AWS-based workflows.
Supported sprint planning, onboarded new team members, contributed as a technical lead, and worked on software migration efforts.

experience.summary: Maintained and extended existing software while working directly with clients, designers, and stakeholders on renewal plans for current products.
achievements: Communicated directly with clients and prepared weekly progress reports.
Maintained and developed existing software in an active delivery environment.
Created project plans for renewing current software and coordinated with designers and clients during implementation.

experience.summary: Built an early software project during internship work, covering application logic, database creation, and interface design.
achievements: Developed a software project using ASP.NET, HTML, and CSS.
Created and developed a SQL Server database for the application.
Designed the interface for the application as part of the internship deliverable.

education.credential: Master's in Modern Technologies in Software Engineering
education.notes: Completed a Master's program focused on modern software engineering technologies in Brasov, Romania.
Studied in English, took part in the 'Competitions and Competitiveness' training, led the class, and was active in university volunteering and student leadership.

education.institution: Center of Excellence in Informatics and Information Technologies
education.notes: Studied programming fundamentals, logical problem solving, database work, networking, and information technologies.

contact.location: Brasov, Romania - Remote-friendly / Open to hybrid collaboration
contact.availability: Based in Brasov and open to software engineering opportunities and collaboration.
